ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., microcontroller, transistor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the component was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the component details were last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specification_types" (
  "specification_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification type */,
  "specification_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specification type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the specification type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the specification type was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the specification type */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the specification type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specification_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the unit */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the unit was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the unit */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the revision */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Entity type (e.g., component, specification) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
